title: pityopsis tenuifolia
intro: Pityopsis tenuifolia, also known as Riddell's goldenrod, is a flowering plant species native to North America, particularly in the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pityopsis tenuifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to address various health concerns.
